016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.cli;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
020
021import java.util.stream.Stream;
022
023/**
024 * JSON-RPC method parameter, parsed from the command-line. There are two implementations: {@link Valid} and {@link Invalid}.
025 * A {@code Valid} contains an object that can be serialized to JSON via a converter/mapper like Jackson. An {@code Invalid}
026 * contains the {@link Exception} that occurred while parsing.
027 */
028public sealed interface CliParameter {
029    /**
030     * Return the source (pre-deserialization) JSON string
031     * @return source string
032     */
033    String source();
034
035    default boolean valid() {
036        return this instanceof CliParameter.Valid;
037    }
038
039    default boolean invalid() {
040        return !valid();
041    }
042
043    /**
044     * Stream zero or 1 valid objects.
045     * <p>This allows {@code .flatMap(CliParameter::stream)} to filter invalid and unwrap valid objects.
046     * @return A stream of zero or one valid objects.
047     */
048    Stream<Object> stream();
049
050    /**
051     * Create a {@code Valid} object
052     * @param source The source CLI string
053     * @param object The resulting object
054     * @return a valid parameter
055     */
056    static Valid valid(String source, Object object) {
057        return new Valid(source, object);
058    }
059
060    /**
061     * Create a {@code Invalid} object
062     * @param source The source CLI string
063     * @param error The error returned from the parser
064     * @return a valid parameter
065     */
066    static Invalid invalid(String source, Exception error) {
067        return new Invalid(source, error);
068    }
069
070    /**
071     * Parse a string returning either a valid or invalid {@code CliParameter}
072     * @param source the CLI parameter string to parse
073     * @param parseFunction a parsing function
074     * @return wraps either parsed, serializable object or an {@code Exception}
075     */
076    static CliParameter parse(String source, Parser parseFunction) {
077        try {
078            return new CliParameter.Valid(source, parseFunction.apply(source));
079        } catch (Exception e) {
080            return new CliParameter.Invalid(source, e);
081        }
082    }
083
084    /**
085     * Implementation for Valid objects
086     * @param source source JSON string
087     * @param object parsed object
088     */
089    record Valid(String source, Object object) implements CliParameter {
090        public Stream<Object> stream() { return Stream.of(object); }
091    }
092
093    /**
094     * Implementation for Invalid source strings
095     * @param source source JSON string
096     * @param error parsing exception
097     */
098    record Invalid(String source, Exception error) implements CliParameter {
099        public Stream<Object> stream() { return Stream.empty(); }
100    }
101
102    /**
103     * Functional interface for parsing a {@link String} to an {@link Object} possibly
104     * throwing an {@link Exception}.
105     */
106    @FunctionalInterface
107    interface Parser {
108        JsonNode apply(String s) throws JsonProcessingException;
109    }
110}
